rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §29.925 governs school district instructional activities for Texas Girls in STEM Day; it is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: each school district may include throughout the month of March appropriate instruction, activities, and programs to encourage and celebrate women in career fields related to science, technology, engineering, and mathematics.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change; no overlap in subject matter.
